---
title: "Generate-Verify-Repair Compression"
chapter_id: "generate-verify-repair-compression"
part_id: "routing-compression-evidence-implementation"
status: "conceptual"
last_updated: "2026-06-24"
primary_sources:
  - "bbvca_v9"
  - "bbvca_main"
  - "cgs"
  - "rankfold_neuralfold"
evidence_level: "argument"
open_evidence_gaps:
  - "Assigned source texts have not yet been ingested or summarized."
  - "No Codex tests have been implemented or run."
  - "Chapter prose is a scaffold, not a completed manuscript draft."
---

# Generate-Verify-Repair Compression

## Chapter status

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Chapter ID | `generate-verify-repair-compression` |
| Part | Part III - Routing, Compression, Evidence, and Implementation |
| Status | conceptual |
| Last updated | 2026-06-24 |
| Primary source records | `bbvca_v9`, `bbvca_main`, `cgs`, `rankfold_neuralfold` |
| Evidence level | argument |
| Source ingestion state | Source records assigned; source texts not yet ingested. |
| Test state | Planned only; no tests have been run. |

## Drafting guardrail

This stub is derived from `book_structure.json` and the source inventory only. It does not claim that the listed source documents have been ingested, summarized, or independently verified.

## Problem

Some representations may be compressed by storing a lawful generator plus exact repairs, but the book needs disciplined claims around this.

## Why existing approaches are insufficient

Compression narratives can overclaim exactness without bounded search, verification, repair accounting, and fallback criteria.

## Core claim

[generate-verify-repair-compression.core, support: argument] Generate-verify-repair compression should store the smallest useful lawful explanation plus the cheapest exact remainder when generation fails.

## Mechanism

- Generate from seeded local laws.
- Verify against target.
- Repair mismatches with exact residual mechanisms and record rate discipline.

## Interfaces

- Evidence measures reconstruction and utility.
- Routing chooses compressed or full representation.
- VCM uses summaries with loss contracts.

## Invariants

- Verification precedes exactness claims.
- Repair cost is counted.
- Search bounds are explicit.

## Failure modes

- Unbounded search.
- Verification skipped.
- Repair larger than original data.

## Minimal implementation

A compression record with generator, verification result, repair residual, and fallback threshold.

## Codex test plan

| Test | Purpose | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Reconstruction quality test | Support or falsify this chapter's layer claim. | planned; not run |
| Repair-cost accounting test | Support or falsify this chapter's layer claim. | planned; not run |
| Bounded-search failure test | Support or falsify this chapter's layer claim. | planned; not run |

## Source crosswalk

| Source ID | Title | Planned use |
|---|---|---|
| `bbvca_v9` | BBVCA_v9_final_public_release | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Prefer v9. Generate-verify-repair compression from seeded local laws, bounded search, two-phase rate discipline. |
| `bbvca_main` | Big Bang Volumetric Compression Architecture | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Earlier/main BBVCA family doc. |
| `cgs` | Compact Generative Systems | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Smallest adequate structure that can generate/govern target without hiding residual complexity. |
| `rankfold_neuralfold` | RankFold + NeuralFold | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Tensor/artifact compression. Low-rank residual coding plus functional preprocessing and probe-route fallback. |

## Summary

This chapter currently establishes the structural slot for this layer of the ASI stack. The next drafting pass should ingest assigned sources, separate source-derived claims from design hypotheses, and update Appendix C when support states change.
